fields.title: [repo-guidance][rule-api] Split rule-target configs into thematic folders across nested workspaces
[repo-guidance][rule-api] Split rule-target configs into thematic folders across nested workspaces

fields.implementation_summary: Extended rule-api to let imports resolve themed rule-target directories, keep fragment output roots workspace-relative when configs live under rule-targets/, and ignore non-config files while loading fragments in deterministic filename order. Split rule-target configs at the root, memory-viewers, memory-api, and viewer-api levels into themed files under rule-targets/ with top-level rule-targets.yaml shims, updated the canonical rule-cli README source entry for directory-backed imports, and validated cargo test -p rule-api load_render_target_config_ -- --nocapture, cargo test -p rule-api resolve_render_target_output_uses_ -- --nocapture, cargo build -p rule-cli, and ./target/debug/rule.exe sync-targets plus --check across memory-viewers/memory-api/rule-targets.yaml, memory-viewers/viewer-api/rule-targets.yaml, memory-viewers/rule-targets.yaml, and rule-targets.yaml.
fields.title: [repo-guidance][rule-api] Split rule-target configs into thematic folders across nested workspaces
